title: cyclosorus evolutus
intro: Cyclosorus evolutus, also known as the Evoluted Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus evolutus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus evolutus are typically made by drying the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used in traditional remedies such as infusions and decoctions.
